nodes.name: extension_aliasing.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests verifying DomainProfile extension round-trip (.rvdna, .rvf, .rvtext, .rvgraph, .rvvis), case insensitivity, and parent/child cross-profile derivation.

nodes.name: extension_round_trip_all_profiles
nodes.summary: Verifies DomainProfile::extension() and from_extension() round-trip for all 5 profiles.

nodes.name: extension_case_insensitive
nodes.summary: Verifies extension parsing is case-insensitive across all profiles.

nodes.name: unknown_extension_returns_none
nodes.summary: Asserts unrecognized extensions return None.

nodes.name: rvdna_file_creates_successfully
nodes.summary: Creates and reopens an .rvdna file verifying file_id non-zero and query functionality.

nodes.name: derive_parent_rvf_to_child_rvdna
nodes.summary: Derives an .rvdna child from a .rvf parent and verifies lineage linkage.

nodes.name: file_identity.rs
nodes.summary: Tests FileIdentity write/read round-trip via Level0Root reserved area, backward compatibility, and root identity detection.

nodes.name: file_identity_write_read_round_trip
nodes.summary: Round-trips a FileIdentity through Level0Root reserved area encoding.

nodes.name: zeroed_reserved_parses_as_root_identity
nodes.summary: Verifies all-zero reserved bytes parse as a valid root FileIdentity.

nodes.name: backward_compat_old_files_still_work
nodes.summary: Confirms old files without lineage data still parse correctly.

nodes.name: file_identity_type_assertions
nodes.summary: Verifies FileIdentity size is 68 bytes and fits in Level0Root reserved area.

nodes.name: file_identity_to_bytes_from_bytes_round_trip
nodes.summary: Round-trips multiple FileIdentity cases through byte serialization.

nodes.name: root_identity_detection
nodes.summary: Tests is_root() detection across root, child, and edge-case identities.

nodes.name: level0_root_preserves_other_fields_with_identity
nodes.summary: Verifies that adding FileIdentity to reserved doesn't corrupt other Level0Root fields.

nodes.name: filter_traversal.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for MembershipFilter with HNSW-like traversal: include/exclude modes, bitmap word boundaries, serialization, and stress testing.

nodes.name: include_mode_empty_filter_is_empty_view
nodes.summary: Asserts an empty include-mode filter contains nothing (fail-safe semantics).

nodes.name: include_mode_subset
nodes.summary: Verifies include-mode filter membership for added/excluded IDs.

nodes.name: exclude_mode_basics
nodes.summary: Verifies exclude-mode semantics where add() marks IDs as excluded.

nodes.name: add_remove_roundtrip
nodes.summary: Tests add/remove restores state with no double-counting.

nodes.name: out_of_bounds_ignored
nodes.summary: Confirms IDs beyond vector_count are silently ignored.

nodes.name: bitmap_word_boundaries
nodes.summary: Verifies bitmap correctness at 64-bit word boundaries.

nodes.name: serialization_round_trip_include
nodes.summary: Round-trips an include-mode filter through serialize/deserialize.

nodes.name: serialization_round_trip_exclude
nodes.summary: Round-trips an exclude-mode filter through serialize/deserialize.

nodes.name: generation_id_tracking
nodes.summary: Verifies generation_id increments and persists across serialization.

nodes.name: large_filter_stress
nodes.summary: Stress test with 10,000 vectors checking bitmap correctness and round-trip.

nodes.name: membership_header_round_trip
nodes.summary: Round-trips MembershipHeader through byte serialization.

nodes.name: index_recall.rs
nodes.summary: HNSW graph recall@K tests using random vectors and brute-force ground truth, plus distance function consistency checks.

nodes.name: random_vectors
nodes.summary: Helper generating n pseudo-random vectors via an LCG.

nodes.name: brute_force_knn
nodes.summary: Helper computing exact k-NN via brute-force L2 distance.

nodes.name: recall_at_k
nodes.summary: Helper computing recall@K between approximate and exact result sets.

nodes.name: hnsw_build_and_query_recall
nodes.summary: Builds HNSW graph and verifies average recall@10 over 50 queries >= 0.90.

nodes.name: hnsw_recall_improves_with_ef_search
nodes.summary: Verifies recall improves monotonically with higher ef_search parameter.

nodes.name: distance_functions_are_consistent
nodes.summary: Sanity checks L2, dot product, and cosine distance functions.

nodes.name: kernel_selection.rs
nodes.summary: Tests deterministic kernel selection by architecture (x86_64/aarch64), signed/unsigned precedence, and KernelBinding/KernelHeader round-trips.

nodes.summary: Embeds an x86_64 kernel segment and verifies header arch field.

nodes.summary: Embeds an aarch64 kernel segment and verifies header arch field.

nodes.name: multi_kernel_file_contains_both
nodes.summary: Verifies a file can contain multiple kernel segments simultaneously.

nodes.name: signed_kernel_flags_preserved
nodes.summary: Confirms signed kernel flags survive disk write/read.

nodes.name: kernel_binding_round_trip
nodes.summary: Round-trips a KernelBinding through serialization.

nodes.name: kernel_binding_persists_through_reopen
nodes.summary: Verifies KernelBinding persists across store close/reopen.

nodes.summary: Stores without embedded kernels return None for binding lookups.

nodes.name: kernel_header_serialization
nodes.summary: Tests KernelHeader byte serialization.

nodes.name: kernel_binding_serialization
nodes.summary: Tests KernelBinding byte serialization.

nodes.summary: Verifies three-level derivation chain with correct lineage at each level.

nodes.name: derived_store_inherits_dimension
nodes.summary: Confirms derived stores inherit parent's vector dimension.

nodes.summary: Verifies FileIdentity persists through store close/reopen.

nodes.name: root_file_has_zero_lineage
nodes.summary: Verifies root files have lineage_depth=0 and zero parent_id.

nodes.name: derive_increments_lineage_depth
nodes.summary: Verifies derivation increments lineage_depth correctly.

nodes.name: parent_hash_is_nonzero_for_derived
nodes.summary: Confirms derived files have a non-zero parent_hash recorded.

nodes.name: lineage_persists_through_reopen
nodes.summary: Verifies lineage records survive close/reopen cycles.

nodes.summary: Round-trips the FileIdentity type through encoding.

nodes.summary: Round-trips a LineageRecord through serialization.

nodes.summary: Asserts the WITNESS_DERIVATION constant value.

nodes.name: lineage_record_long_description_truncation

nodes.name: version_forward_compatibility_unknown_tags_skipped

nodes.name: sealed_segment_flag_preserved

nodes.name: compressed_flag_preserved
nodes.summary: Confirms COMPRESSED flag survives encode/decode.

nodes.summary: Verifies scalar quantization preserves k-NN ordering despite lossy compression.

nodes.summary: Verifies writer lock prevents concurrent write access.

nodes.summary: Tests bulk deletion via filter predicates.

nodes.name: smoke_metadata_and_ids
nodes.summary: Verifies metadata and vector IDs are preserved through store operations.
